title: WaterConsumption
description: Citywide water-consumption for a single year, from 'Water Consumption in the City of New York' (ia2d-e54m, 4 columns) — DEP's single most-viewed dataset. NOTE the asymmetry: DEP publishes consumption only at the CITYWIDE aggregate. Per-ACCOUNT consumption and billing live only inside the login-walled My DEP Account portal (uMAX Customer Information System) and have no Open Data twin — see water-service-request.json and tech-stack.md.

population.description: New York City population ('New York City Population').

consumptionMgd.description: NYC consumption in million gallons per day ('NYC Consumption(Million gallons per day)').

perCapitaGpcd.description: Per-capita consumption, gallons per person per day ('Per Capita(Gallons per person per day)').
